a.xlink:title: Get the period for executing maneuvers.
Get the size of the maneuver queue.
The maneuver execution timer callback.
Fetches the next reference and publishes it. Will fetch the reference using the registered callback,...
Progresses the scheduler. If a maneuver is executing, evaluates whether it has terminated....
Get the current drone state.
Cancels all pending maneuvers.
Creation time getter.
Denies all pending token requests, to be called by the master.
Gives the token to a slave, to be called by the master.
Goal handle getter.
Whether a slave has requested the token.
Get the timeout duration for updating a maneuver after registering.
Get the timeout duration for the server to start executing a maneuver after Start() has been called.
Maneuver type getter.
Get whether a maneuver is being executed or pending.
Whether the token is held by the master.
Get the number of seconds without a maneuver before the scheduler goes from hovering to idle.
Pops an item from the queue.
Triggers the maneuver to start by calling the underlying execute function on the goal handle.
Start time getter.
Getter for the success flag.
Getter for the termianted flag.
Clears the queue.
Is master.
Answers a slave acquisition request.
Whether the token is held by the calling thread.
